code: /** Cost trigger / signal helpers for findings and table badges. */function parseEvidence(finding){if(!finding)return{};if(typeof finding.evidence==='string'){try{return JSON.parse(finding.evidence);}catch(_unused){return{};}}return finding.evidence&&typeof finding.evidence==='object'?finding.evidence:{};}export function findingTriggerMetrics(finding){if(Array.isArray(finding===null||finding===void 0?void 0:finding.trigger_metrics)&&finding.trigger_metrics.length){return finding.trigger_metrics;}const evidence=parseEvidence(finding);return Array.isArray(evidence.trigger_metrics)?evidence.trigger_metrics:[];}export function countTriggerMetricsForFindings(){let findings=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:[];const keys=new Set();for(const finding of findings){for(const item of findingTriggerMetrics(finding)){const key=(item===null||item===void 0?void 0:item.fact_key)||(item===null||item===void 0?void 0:item.label);if(key)keys.add(key);}}return keys.size;}export function primaryTriggerLabel(){let findings=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:[];for(const finding of findings){const metrics=findingTriggerMetrics(finding);if(metrics.length){return metrics[0].label||metrics[0].fact_key||null;}}return null;}
